Item.Text: Airat Abdrakov is a teapot :)
Full path to .hpt file not found
Project file could not be parsed
Unexpected tag in .hptproj file
File could not be found by lexer
Unexpected declaration in struct type
Expressions expected in binary expression
Expression expected in unary expression
Argument name expected to be an identifier
Failed to parse args
Parameter name expected to be an identifier
Param default value expected to be an expression
Failed to parse parameters
Lambda param name expected to be an expression
Cast sub expected to be an expression
Cast target expected to be an expression
Array size expected to be an expression
Array size has to be specified
Only the last array size could be not specified
Unexpected token in array definition
Array elements expected to be expressions
Unexpected token in array elements
Call argument expected to be an expression
Call name expected to be an identifier
Unexpected token in array access expression
Array access has to have args
Array acces has to many args
Array access argument is not an expression
Declaration name expected to be an identifier
Unexpected expression after tilda (~)
Failed to parse an expression
